name: joai-multiversx
description: Connect MultiversX to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT. Check balances, view transactions, manage staking, and interact with ESDT tokens through natural language.

interface.shortDescription: Connect MultiversX to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT. Check balances, view transactions, manage staking, and interact with ESDT tokens through natural language.
interface.longDescription: MultiversX, the EGLD network, is a distributed blockchain network for next-gen applications. Decentralized via 3,000+ nodes, scalable through sharding, fast, secure & green.
defaultPrompt: What is the EGLD balance of erd1...?
